query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: India's first consumer court order on E20 goes in Chhattisgarh vehicle owner's favour
articles.description: The Raipur consumer commission ruled for a vehicle owner who blamed E20 petrol for recurring engine trouble. The order highlights fuel choice constraints and fixes liability for repair costs and compensation.

articles.title: Dollar Dips Amid Softer U.S. Inflation and Rising Middle East Tensions
articles.description: The dollar declined against major currencies, influenced by softer U.S. inflation data and conflicts with Iran. The U.S. Producer Price Index fell, boosting Fed patience over interest rates. While easing inflation pressures weighed on the dollar, Middle East tensions sustained high oil prices, impacting its outlook.

articles.title: India raises windfall tax on diesel & ATF exports, cuts tariff on petrol
articles.description: Diesel export levy raised to Rs 15.5/litre, ATF to Rs 14.5/litre; petrol duty cut to Rs 2.5/litre.

articles.title: If inflation is 'cooling,' why are prices still so high?
articles.description: Consumers learned this week that inflation “cooled” in June , thanks in part to falling gas prices. But prices still rose. In fact, the 3.5% annual inflati

articles.title: Flex-fuel vehicles better fit for India than E25 rollout: AIDA
articles.description: A national debate has been raging over the impact of 20% ethanol-blended petrol (E20) on the engines and fuel efficiency of vehicles not designed to run on such fuel, with many consumers demanding either a rollback of the programme or the option to buy petrol with a lower or zero ethanol blend.

articles.title: Higher gas prices affecting summer plans, survey finds
articles.description: Rising gas prices have many families rethinking their summer vacation plans, according to a new survey.

articles.title: Crude Oil Prices Move Higher on the Prospects of Tighter Global Supplies
articles.description: August WTI crude oil (CLQ26 ) on Wednesday closed up +0.26 (+0.33%), and August RBOB gasoline (RBQ26 ) closed up +0.0736 (+2.28%). Crude oil and gasoline prices settled higher on Wednesday, with gasoline up sharply at a 7-week high. Crude prices foun...

articles.title: Forecasts for Hot US Temps Boost Nat-Gas Prices
articles.description: August Nymex natural gas (NGQ26 ) on Wednesday closed up +0.020 (+0.69%). Nat-gas prices settled higher on Wednesday as forecasts for above-average US temperatures are expected to boost nat-gas demand from electricity suppliers to power air-condition...

articles.title: Oil prices threaten further Wall Street gains
articles.description: Strong financial earnings are supporting Wall Street sentiment, but rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions remain key risks.

articles.title: Why Australians shouldn't panic about latest surge in oil prices and state of supply
articles.description: With the price of oil rising and the fuel excise cut due to end, drivers are facing twin threats when it comes to the price of fuel, but experts say Australia is in a much better position compared with when the Middle East conflict began.
